method: Hard-dollar ON specs verified bottom-up: primary documents (avisos de suscripcion/resultados published per CNV rules, SEC 20-F/6-K filings, deal-counsel deal notes) cross-checked against broker/golden pages (Cohen ficha BYMA, IOL page titles, cbonds, FIX/Moody's Local rating reports). remainingCashflows are per 100 VN ORIGINAL face, payments strictly AFTER 2026-06-10 (a coupon falling on 2026-06-10 itself belongs to the seller at T+1 settlement and is excluded). Interest = annualRatePct/2 x outstanding factor (30/360 semiannual), except BYCW which accrues actual/365 per its aviso.

instruments.remainingCashflowsNote: Per 100 VN, actual/365: final interest 6.00% x 200/365 x 100 = 3.2877 (period 2026-05-14 -> 2026-11-30, derived schedule) + 100 principal at 2026-11-30. Alternative if last coupon period started 2026-05-30: interest 3.0247.

notes: BYMA D-lines (USD MEP) carry the RegS ISIN for NY-law ONs (Cohen fichas).
Min denominations split the panel: TLCM and VSCV trade in VN US$1,000 minimum (multiples of US$1,000); TLCP and TLCT trade in VN US$1 (retail-friendly); BYCW VN US$1,000 + multiples of US$1.

All percentages of amortizing installments are pct of ORIGINAL face (per avisos: 'del Valor Nominal' / 'del Monto de Capital Pendiente Original'); interest accrues on the reduced outstanding after each installment.
VSCV pays a 4.25 coupon on the asOf date 2026-06-10 itself - excluded from remainingCashflows (settlement 2026-06-11).

Verification run 2026-06-10: all 5 instruments internally consistent (remaining amortization sums to 100 = current residual; coupon = rate/2 x outstanding factor on 30/360 pattern dates, BYCW act/365 6% x 200/365 = 3.2877) and golden-checked vs Docta Capital published TIR (max |delta| 0.0031pp) and Macaulay duration (max diff 0.0023y). No corrections required. BYCW first-coupon-date flag (2026-05-14 derived) corroborated by Docta accrued-interest parity; flag retained pending aviso de resultados.
